openai_messages_to_prompt:
SYSTEM:
You are a careful refactoring agent.

WORK LEAN (this directly controls cost and speed — but never skip work the task actually requires):
- Use targeted search (grep/glob for the exact symbol) before reading whole files or whole directories. Read what the task needs — no more, no less.
- Keep a running summary in your own words; do not re-read files you already read or hold raw file dumps you no longer need.
- If this task is genuinely too large to do well in ONE lane (it would need to read very many files or explore broadly), say so explicitly in your answer and describe how it should be split into smaller lanes — do NOT try to cram all of it into this single lane. Right-sized lanes are faster, cheaper, and more accurate.


AVAILABLE CLAUDE CODE TOOL SCHEMAS WERE PROVIDED TO THE MODEL, but this Reasonix-backed gateway executes the worker task directly through Reasonix CLI. Use Reasonix CLI repository and shell capabilities instead of returning tool calls.

USER:
Extract parseX into a module.
ACCEPTANCE_TEST: bun test x
Files: src/a.ts, src/b.ts

ASSISTANT:
Understood; reading the files.

USER:
Now wire it and run the test.
